Frontend Risk Management page loads with all 4 sections: Circuit Breaker (ARMED), Trading Sessions (ASIA active), Market Regime Detection (8 symbols showing CALM), Monte Carlo Simulation (1000 sims with results). All navigation working.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase3_risk_management.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Phase 3 Risk Management

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Risk page loads, all 4 sections visible, Monte Carlo simulation works, navigation working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Professional-Grade Risk Management fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/risk/circuit-breaker (returns tripped, current_drawdown, peak_balance, max_drawdown_threshold), POST /api/risk/circuit-breaker/reset (resets breaker, unpauses bot), GET /api/risk/regime (returns regime per symbol with strength and details), GET /api/risk/sessions (returns current session info, allowed sessions, session times), POST /api/risk/monte-carlo (runs 1000 simulations, returns mean/median/percentiles, risk metrics, distribution). Frontend: Risk Management page at /risk shows Circuit Breaker section with ARMED/TRIPPED badge and drawdown bar, Trading Sessions with active session highlighted, Market Regime Detection grid for all symbols, Monte Carlo section with Run Simulation button that displays results. Sidebar has ShieldAlert icon + Risk Management nav item.
mocked_api_note: Bot runs in DRY mode. Market regime uses simulated candle data. Monte Carlo uses historical trade PnLs (86 trades available).
